arguments.expression: console.log('=== Screen Object Test ==='); try { console.log('window.screen exists:', typeof window.screen); console.log('screen object:', !!screen); if (screen) { console.log('screen.width:', screen.width); console.log('screen.height:', screen.height); console.log('screen.availWidth:', screen.availWidth); console.log('screen.availHeight:', screen.availHeight); console.log('screen.colorDepth:', screen.colorDepth); console.log('screen.pixelDepth:', screen.pixelDepth); console.log('screen.orientation:', typeof screen.orientation); } else { console.log('❌ screen object not implemented'); } } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
